title: Parquet writer heap-use-after-free with output_format_parquet_batch_size
description:
### Describe the bug
Seen here: https://s3.amazonaws.com/clickhouse-test-reports/json.html?REF=master&sha=61c115c2fb78c256b3a677d49bfc037ecde4d4ac&name_0=MasterCI&name_1=BuzzHouse+%28arm_asan%29 cc @al13n321
### How to reproduce
Simplified to:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 JSON) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO TABLE FUNCTION url('http://localhost:8123/?query=INSERT+INTO+t0+(c0)+FORMAT+Parquet', 'Parquet', 'c0 JSON') SELECT '{"c0":1}' FROM numbers(10) SETTINGS output_format_parquet_batch_size = 4;
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```
==600==ERROR: AddressSanitizer: heap-use-after-free on address 0x5040033a1450 at pc 0xab845836c680 bp 0xff90d4479470 sp 0xff90d4478c58
READ of size 11 at 0x5040033a1450 thread T735 (ParquetEncoder)

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT UNSIGNED, data VARCHAR(255), value DOUBLE) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE t2 AS t1 ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO t2 (id, data, value) SELECT id, data, value FROM t1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE t3 (json_data JSON) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO t3 SELECT JSON_OBJECT('id', id, 'data', data, 'value', value) FROM t2;
